details: Code looked for 'WarriorVisuals' but node was named 'WarriorSprites'
fix: Updated all references to use correct node name

details: Warrior sprites were being created multiple times on reload
fix: Added loop to remove existing WarriorSprites before creating new ones

details: Using await get_tree().process_frame in setup_3d_model caused timing issues
fix: Removed await, use simple for loop with queue_free() instead

details: Old placeholder visuals covering new warrior sprites
fix: Added warrior.z_index = 10 and move_child to top of visuals

details: Rapid flipping back and forth when fighters overlap
fix: Added FACING_DEADZONE = 10.0 pixels to prevent jitter
